Stub functions for testing timeline resource functionalities in the Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
This code is a C++ header file that provides a narrow set of functions related to timeline resources. It includes three functions: [`timeline_resources_get_id_system`](<#timeline_resources_get_id_system>), [`timeline_resources_get_id`](<#timeline_resources_get_id>), and [`timeline_resources_is_system`](<#timeline_resources_is_system>). The [`timeline_resources_get_id_system`](<#timeline_resources_get_id_system>) function takes a `TimelineResourceId`, a `TimelineResourceSize`, a `ResAppNum`, and a pointer to `AppResourceInfo`, and it returns a boolean value, currently set to `false`. The [`timeline_resources_get_id`](<#timeline_resources_get_id>) function takes a pointer to `TimelineResourceInfo`, a `TimelineResourceSize`, and a pointer to `AppResourceInfo`, but it does not perform any operations. The [`timeline_resources_is_system`](<#timeline_resources_is_system>) function checks if a given `TimelineResourceId` is a system resource, returning `false`. The file includes the `timeline_resources.h` header, indicating that it is part of a larger system dealing with timeline resources.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `services/normal/timeline/timeline_resources.h`
